title: The Lamps!
body:
The Lamps!

This mod adds new lighting elements: lamps! and items for their crafting. ## Translations > You can help me translate "Husbandry and Pies!" into your language or a language you know by sending your translation to issues. + English (United States, 1.0+) — [@ilotterytea](https://github.com/ilotterytea) + Russian (Русский, 1.0+) — [@ilotterytea](https://github.com/ilotterytea) + German (Deutsch, 1.0.1+) — [@X00LA](https://github.com/x00la) ## Notes! + The mod is completely free to use for modpacks. If you wish, you can provide a link to the mod. + If this mod is ever abandoned, you can use the source code and create your own version. # Screenshots: ![The Lamps!](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/329/733/2020-12-26_00.png)
New lighting elements: Lamps!

![All crafting recipes](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/331/776/crafting.jpg)
All the crafting recipes in this mod.
